rain_anomaly_dekad.legend_text: 10-day precipitation anomaly compared to the long term average. Derived from CHIRPS (UCSB Climate Hazards Group)

rain_anomaly_1month.legend_text: Monthly precipitation anomaly compared to the long term average. Derived from CHIRPS (UCSB Climate Hazards Group)

rain_anomaly_3month.legend_text: 3-month precipitation anomaly compared to the long term average. Derived from CHIRPS (UCSB Climate Hazards Group)

rain_anomaly_6month.legend_text: 6-month precipitation anomaly compared to the long term average. Derived from CHIRPS (UCSB Climate Hazards Group)

rain_anomaly_9month.legend_text: 9-month precipitation anomaly compared to the long term average. Derived from CHIRPS (UCSB Climate Hazards Group)

rain_anomaly_1year.legend_text: 1-year precipitation anomaly compared to the long term average. Derived from CHIRPS (UCSB Climate Hazards Group)

rainfall_dekad.legend_text: Estimate of precipitation over a 10-day period derived from CHIRPS (UCSB Climate Hazards Group)

rainfall_agg_1month.title: 1-month rainfall aggregate (mm)
rainfall_agg_1month.legend_text: Total aggregate precipitation over a 1-month period, rolling every 10 days. Derived from CHIRPS (UCSB Climate Hazards Group)

rainfall_agg_3month.legend_text: Total aggregate precipitation over a 3-month period, rolling every 10 days. Derived from CHIRPS (UCSB Climate Hazards Group)

rainfall_agg_6month.legend_text: Total aggregate precipitation over a 6-month period, rolling every 10 days. Derived from CHIRPS (UCSB Climate Hazards Group)

rainfall_agg_9month.legend_text: Total aggregate precipitation over a 9-month period, rolling every 10 days. Derived from CHIRPS (UCSB Climate Hazards Group)

rainfall_agg_1year.legend_text: Total aggregate precipitation over a 1-year period, rolling every 10 days. Derived from CHIRPS (UCSB Climate Hazards Group)

streak_dry_days.title: Longest number of consecutive dry days

days_intense_rain.legend_text: Total number of heavy rain days (rainfall > 90th percentile) within last 30 days of dekad

days_extreme_rain.legend_text: Total number of heavy rain days (rainfall > 95th percentile) within last 30 days of dekad

streak_heavy_rain.title: Longest consecutive number of days with heavy rainfall in the last 30 days

ndvi_dekad_anomaly.legend_text: Normalized Difference Vegetation Index (NDVI) anomaly when compared to the long-term average

lst_anomaly.title: Daytime Land Surface Temperature - 10-day Anomaly (MODIS)
lst_anomaly.legend_text: Daytime land surface temperature anomaly when compared to long-term average
